name: Obesity
scope: A condition characterized by excessive body fat.

name: Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2
scope: A metabolic disorder characterized by insulin resistance.

name: Physical Activity
scope: Bodily movement produced by skeletal muscles.

name: Hypertension
scope: High blood pressure.

name: Cancer
scope: A group of diseases involving abnormal cell growth.

name: Cardiovascular Diseases
scope: Diseases of the heart and blood vessels.

name: Mental Health
scope: Emotional, psychological, and social well-being.

name: Nutrition
scope: The intake of food and its effects on health.

name: Genomics
scope: The study of genomes of organisms.

name: Proteomics
scope: The study of the proteome of organisms.

name: Immunology
scope: Study of the immune system.

name: Neuroscience
scope: Study of the nervous system.

name: Epidemiology
scope: Study of the distribution and determinants of health and diseases.

name: Bioinformatics
scope: Application of computational tools to biological data.

name: Stem Cells
scope: Undifferentiated cells capable of giving rise to multiple cell types.

name: Vaccination
scope: Administration of a vaccine to stimulate immunity.

name: Antibiotics
scope: Drugs used to treat bacterial infections.

name: Clinical Trials
scope: Research studies to evaluate medical interventions.

name: Public Health
scope: Science and practice of protecting and improving community health.

name: Environmental Health
scope: Study of environmental factors affecting health.
